business_capability: Commit one business outcome for one operation identity while allowing at-least-once execution and replay.

failure_semantics.duplicate_delivery: Concurrent or repeated delivery must return the canonical completed result without repeating the business effect.
failure_semantics.ambiguous_completion: A crash after the external effect but before workflow completion must recover without repeating the effect.
failure_semantics.abandoned_execution: An expired in-progress lease may be reclaimed by a new execution owner.
failure_semantics.derived_state: Committed source state must publish through an outbox and any missing or incorrect projection must be detected and repaired.
